entities.description: tree t is a structure that is established before proceeding to the next step
knowledge graph g is a structure that is populated by extracting and refining entities from the tree nodes
tree nodes are the components within tree t from which entities are extracted and refined

relations.description: tree t is the source from which entities are extracted to populate knowledge graph g
tree nodes are the constituent parts of tree t that serve as the source for entity extraction
knowledge graph g is populated by extracting and refining entities from tree nodes
